title: envelope test usable without require declaration
description: RFC 5228 §5.4 requires that the 'envelope' test be declared via require ["envelope"] before use. check_extension_use in lib.rs only enforces this for EXTENSION_COMMANDS = ["fileinto", "reject"]; the 'envelope' test is absent from that list. A script using 'if envelope :is ...' without a require declaration compiles successfully and evaluates instead of returning MissingRequire at compile time. Fix: add "envelope" to EXTENSION_COMMANDS in check_extension_use.
